description: Payloads exploiting permissive object-src — plugin-based script execution via <object>, <embed>, <applet>

payloads.description: Flash object — executes SWF from attacker origin
payloads.csp_bypass: Permissive object-src allows loading Flash with ExternalInterface

payloads.description: Flash embed — alternative to object tag
payloads.csp_bypass: Permissive object-src allows embed tag with Flash

payloads.description: Object with data URI — creates HTML execution context
payloads.csp_bypass: Object tag with data: URI creates new browsing context

payloads.description: Embed with data URI — creates HTML execution context
payloads.csp_bypass: Embed tag with data: URI may execute in permissive context
Scriptlet object type bypasses script-src in legacy browsers

payloads.description: Object with javascript: URI — direct script execution
payloads.csp_bypass: Object tag with javascript: URI may execute in some browsers
